channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Would Regime Change Solve the Iran Challenge? | State of Play
item.description: The CSIS Geopolitics and Foreign Policy Department unpack the lessons from regime change operations in the Middle East and beyond.

item.title: Macron’s Île-Longue Speech: Updating France’s Nuclear Doctrine for a New Era
item.description: President Macron’s updated doctrine marks a watershed for European defense, with an increased French nuclear arsenal and a “forward deterrence” strategy that integrates regional conventional capabilities. It aims to provide the operational means for strategic autonomy.
